system.description: Diner cars feature a galley and several dining tables. The dining tables seat 2 on the right-hand side and 4 on the left-hand side, with a central passageway dividing the rows. There are 6 rows making 36 total seats. The galley contains a pantry, freezer, and full kitchen. This is where the train’s food supply is stocked, holding up to 150 rations. The passageway moves to the right-hand side of the train to pass the galley. Diner cars without the galley are able to seat 60.
